Module ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva
Package ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.config

Class GameConfig

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.config.GameConfig
public class GameConfig extends Object
Game configuration and level settings.
